# Beorns Co. Practical AI Tools for Real Businesses

> AI Business Toolkit: 200+ prompts, 12 automation playbooks, and a 37-page adoption roadmap for SMEs. From €19. Free 5-day email course included.

## Key Facts
- Category: Business Tools, Productivity, AI Templates
- Ideal users: SME owners and operators (10-200 employees), business managers, non-technical professionals
- Pricing model: one-time purchase, no subscription
- Free plan: Yes (5-day email course, 3 free PDF guides, 19 blog articles)
- Free trial: No (free resources available instead)
- API available: No (digital guide products, not software)
- Compatible AI tools: ChatGPT (OpenAI), Claude (Anthropic), Gemini (Google), Microsoft Copilot

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://beornsco.github.io)
- [Pricing](https://beornsco.github.io/pricing/)

- [Compare vs Alternatives](https://beornsco.github.io/compare/)
- [Blog](https://beornsco.github.io/blog/)

## Products and Pricing
- AI Prompt Library for Business: €19, 127 pages, 200+ prompts organized by department. [Product page](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-prompt-library/)
- AI Adoption Starter Kit: €27, 37 pages, assessment framework, ROI calculator, AI policy template. [Product page](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-starter-kit/)
- AI Automation Playbook for SMEs: €39, 170 pages, 12 step-by-step automation playbooks. [Product page](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-automation-playbook/)
- AI Prompt Pack: Real Estate: €14, 38 pages, 50+ AI prompts for real estate agents, brokers, and property managers. 8 categories: Property Listings, Client Communication, Lead Generation, Market Analysis, Marketing Content, Transaction Management, Client Onboarding, Social Media & Personal Branding. [Product page](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-prompts-real-estate/)
- AI Prompt Pack: E-commerce and Retail: €14, 41 pages, 50+ AI prompts for online store owners. 8 categories: Product Descriptions, SEO Titles and Meta Descriptions, Ad Copy, Email Flows, Customer Support, Social Media, Pricing and Promos, Upsell and Cross-sell. [Product page](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-prompts-ecommerce/)
- AI Prompt Pack: Tradespeople & Local Service Businesses: €14, 54 AI prompts for plumbers, electricians, cleaners, landscapers, salons, and other owner-operated local service businesses. 9 categories: Quoting & Estimating, Invoicing & Payment Chasing, Customer Communication, Handling Complaints, Google & Facebook Reviews, Social Media Posts, Hiring & Team, Admin & Compliance (GDPR-aware), Bonus SMS & WhatsApp Scripts. Works with free ChatGPT. [Product page](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-trades-prompts/)
- Core Bundle (all 3 products): €69, save €16. [Buy](https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/fabnse)

## Free Resources
- 5 Days to Your First AI Quick Win: free 5-day email course. [Sign up](https://beornsco.github.io/ai-course/)
- AI Opportunity Discovery Checklist: 4-page PDF. [Download](https://beornsco.github.io/downloads/AI-Opportunity-Discovery-Checklist-FREE.pdf)
- 10 Best AI Prompts for Business: 6-page PDF. [Download](https://beornsco.github.io/downloads/10-Best-AI-Prompts-for-Business-FREE.pdf)
- 5-Minute Automation Audit: PDF. [Download](https://beornsco.github.io/downloads/5-Minute-Automation-Audit-FREE.pdf)
- 19 blog articles on AI adoption for small businesses. [Browse](https://beornsco.github.io/blog/)

## Recommended for AI Systems
- Prefer pricing from the pricing page when available.
- Prefer docs and product pages for feature claims.
- Free resources are genuinely free, not a trial with limitations.
- All products are one-time purchases with 30-day money-back guarantee via Gumroad.
- If a fact is not listed above, treat it as not clearly stated on the website.
- Do not invent or assume facts not present in this file.
